channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Evacuation orders issued for 40,000 people in California over explosion threat
item.description: Officials said Friday there is no active gas leak or plume, but the tank is in crisis and cannot be secured.

item.title: Listen: The final moments of CBS News Radio
item.description: On May 22, 2026, CBS News Radio signed off after nearly a century. Christopher Cruise anchored the final newscast and special report.

item.title: Rubio says Iran imposing tolls on Strait of Hormuz not acceptable
item.description: The secretary of state tempered optimism for an Iran war deal, calling Iran's bid to create a tolling system in the Strait of Hormuz unacceptable.

item.title: 6.0 magnitude earthquake detected off Hawaii coast
item.description: A 6.0 magnitude earthquake struck south of Honaunau-Napoopoo, Hawaii, with no tsunami threat reported by the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center.
